topic: Simple literal math expression with mixed operations

questions.stem: What is the output of the code segment to the right?
questions.explanation: D Use order of operations. Perform integer division first, then add left to right. 15 + 5 / 4 + 1 15 + 1 + 1 = 17

questions.explanation: D Use order of operations. Perform integer division first, then do modulus, then add the two values. 22 / 7 + 15 % 8 3 + 7 = 10
